mentions.note: Trades <20x earnings with only 1% organic growth (management guidance 3–4% later). Systematically overvalued relative to growth; capital flowing away from legacy biopharma vendors.
Dropped after earnings but now cheap at 19x earnings. IPO machine will need TMO's biotech equipment. Buy on weakness.

Beat and raised full-year outlook despite light Q2 guidance and 1% organic growth (lowest in 4Q). Pharma/biotech (60% revenue) accelerating; biotech funding inflection underway. Nvidia AI collaboration expanding autonomous lab demand. China headwinds overstated.
